items.title: Australian IS families in Syria camp turned back after leaving for home
items.description: The group of 34 women and children with family links to Islamic State group have been held in the Roj camp for nearly seven years.

items.title: Actor Robert Duvall, who starred in The Godfather, dies aged 95
items.description: The Oscar-winner died "peacefully" at his home in Middleburg, Virginia, on Sunday, his family says.

items.title: How Robert Duvall became a Hollywood great
items.description: A look at the life of the prolific actor whose many films included Apocalypse Now and The Godfather.

items.title: US build-up of warships and fighter jets tracked near Iran
items.description: BBC Verify has seen US aircraft carrier USS Abraham Lincoln near Iran ahead of talks between the two countries

items.title: Ancient bone may prove legendary war elephant crossing of Alps
items.description: It would be the first hard evidence that elephants were used in battle by General Hannibal.
